summary: Compares two mapping records to produce a deterministic sort order based on original position first and generated position/name only when requested.
signature_intent: Accepts two mapping-like records and a boolean that limits comparison to original-location fields, returning a negative, zero, or positive ordering value.
behavior: Orders first by source identifier using string comparison.
Then orders by original line number.
Then orders by original column number.
When original-only comparison is enabled, stops after original column comparison.
Otherwise orders by generated column number, then generated line number.
Finally orders by optional name using string comparison.
Returns zero when all compared fields are equivalent.
edge_cases: Missing or non-string text fields follow the underlying string comparison behavior.
Missing or non-numeric position fields can produce non-standard numeric comparison results.
When original-only comparison is enabled, records with matching original fields compare as equal even if generated fields or names differ.
forbidden_details: No variable names, repository names, source paths, or incidental implementation quirks are included.
